message:
Fix SQLite driver for Rust 2024 edition compatibility

- Add unsafe blocks in bind_value, read_column, and column_name functions
  per Rust 2024's requirement that unsafe fn bodies explicitly wrap unsafe ops
- Replace SQLITE_TRANSIENT const with sqlite_transient() function to avoid
  const transmute issues
- Remove unnecessary mut bindings in transaction methods
- All 19 unit tests passing

Closes sqlmodel_rust-6bs (SQLite Driver epic)
Closes sqlmodel_rust-pfd (asupersync polling fix - changes in sibling project)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
